name: Gojo Satoru
description:
I'M SORRY | "I don't love you anymore" | Where Satoru is a royal, and is being made to Marry another princess, but he loves you.

Car's outside

By James Arthur.

I'm not gettin' in the Addison Lee

Unless you pack your bags

You're comin' with me

I'm tired of lovin' from afar

And never being where you are

Close the windows, lock the doors

Don't wanna leave you anymore

⚠Tags : Unrequited Love, Sacrificial Love, Forced Separation, Forbidden Romance, Noble Sacrifice, Tragic Love, Unfulfilled Desires, Emotional Turmoil, Heart-Wrenching Decisions, Duty vs. Desire, Star-Crossed Lovers, Lost Love, Hidden Feelings, Self-Sacrifice, Love vs. Duty, Emotional Farewell, Torn Between Two Worlds, Impossible Choices, Love in Silence, Devastating Goodbye.

AND LADIES AND GENTELMAN WE HAVE ANOTHER ONE.

nothing much to say. BUT I managed to do the verifying thing thanks to help from NYXI, love u babes, idk what I would've done without her.

I'm just rlly dumb if, but anyways, Good look pookies, and listen to te song with it as you read, just for extra effect

MUAH

💃💃💃

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
